_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Golden Knights look to tighten their grip on the Cup, but the Hurricanes face a desperate must-win scenario to keep their championship dreams from slipping away in Raleigh. With the series momentum hanging in the balance, tonight’s clash is a high-stakes collision between Vegas’s clinical depth and Carolina’s relentless home-ice pressure.

The Tigers look to keep their flickering postseason pulse alive as they open a critical series against a Rays squad playing strictly for pride. With Detroit desperate to close the gap in the Wild Card race, every pitch tonight carries the weight of their fading October dreams.

The Padres roll into Citizens Bank Park looking to gain ground in the crowded Wild Card race, but they’ll have to solve a Phillies squad desperate to reclaim their momentum atop the National League. With postseason positioning tightening, this high-stakes clash serves as an early litmus test for two heavyweights eyeing October.

The Orioles arrive at Fenway looking to tighten their grip on the AL East, while the Red Sox fight to stay relevant in an increasingly desperate Wild Card chase. With postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in this high-stakes divisional clash carries massive weight.

The Marlins and Nationals collide in a battle of cellar-dwellers looking to salvage pride as both franchises pivot toward long-term rebuilds. With draft positioning and roster auditions on the line, every pitch serves as a high-stakes evaluation for young talent fighting to secure a spot in next year’s plans.

The Guardians roll into the Bronx looking to tighten their grip on the AL Central, but they’ll have to solve a Yankees lineup hungry to prove they’re the team to beat in the American League. With postseason seeding implications looming, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two of the league’s top contenders.

The Royals look to tighten their grip on an AL Wild Card spot as they open a pivotal series against a Reds team desperate to play spoiler in the Queen City. With Kansas City fighting for postseason positioning, every pitch tonight carries massive weight in the race for October.

The White Sox look to avoid further embarrassment as they limp into Minneapolis to face a Twins squad desperate to tighten their grip on the AL Wild Card race. With Chicago playing out the string and Minnesota fighting for October survival, tonight is a mismatch of motivation that the Twins cannot afford to squander.

The Giants head to Milwaukee desperate to gain ground in a crowded Wild Card race, but they’ll have to solve a Brewers squad looking to tighten their grip on the NL Central crown. With postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in this series carries massive weight for two teams fighting to control their own October destiny.

The Rangers roll into St. Louis desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Cardinals squad fighting to stay relevant in a crowded Wild Card hunt. With both teams clinging to the fringes of contention, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two clubs running out of time to make a move.
The Athletics look to play spoiler at Wrigley Field as the Cubs fight to keep their fading postseason pulse alive in a must-win series opener.

The Pirates head to Minute Maid Park looking to salvage momentum, while the Astros aim to tighten their grip on the AL West lead in a high-stakes clash of postseason hopefuls. With Houston surging and Pittsburgh desperate to stay relevant, every pitch carries playoff-level intensity tonight.

The Rockies look to salvage pride in Anaheim as they clash with an Angels squad desperate to gain traction in a crowded basement battle. With both teams fighting to avoid the cellar, tonight’s interleague tilt is a gritty test of which struggling rotation can finally find its footing.

The Dodgers look to tighten their grip on the NL West as they clash with a Diamondbacks squad desperate to maintain their momentum in a crowded Wild Card race. With postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in this desert showdown carries massive weight for both clubs.
The Mets arrive in Seattle fighting to keep their wild-card pulse alive, but they face a Mariners rotation desperate to salvage a fading postseason bid in a high-stakes interleague clash.
